topic: A mysterious black magician (Odiyan) who can shape-shift into animals at night in a Palakkad village
previous_summary: Villagers are terrified by Ayyappan's human scream followed by a vanishing shadow near the river, leading to the discovery of his blood-stained mundu the next morning, confirming the Odiyan's return and prompting elders to deliberate as the shape-shifting figure now stalks another victim.
